title: The J.M. Smucker (SJM) Queued Up for Q3 Earnings: Things to Note
text: The J.M. Smucker's (SJM) third-quarter fiscal 2022 results are likely to reflect a sequential decline in the gross margin due to cost inflation, while the focus on core strategies bodes well.

title: 7 Food Stocks to Store Up On Amid Inflation Concerns
text: Economic recovery can be brutal to the stock market. But one way to combat the bruising selloff is to add some food stocks to your portfolio.

title: The J.M. Smucker Co. to Present at the 2022 Consumer Analyst Group of New York (CAGNY) Conference and Report Third Quarter Earnings
text: ORRVILLE, Ohio, Feb. 8, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The J.M. Smucker Co. (NYSE: SJM) invites interested parties to view its executive management presentation during the 2022 CAGNY Virtual Conference on Tuesday, February 22, 2022, at 4:10 p.m.
